metadata.name: Manufacturing Sector - Safety and Environmental Compliance
metadata.description: Knowledge Graph for OSHA safety and environmental compliance in manufacturing facilities

rules.subject: Workplace injury
rules.reasoning: OSHA requires immediate reporting of serious injuries

rules.subject: Chemical storage
rules.reasoning: Hazard Communication Standard requires proper chemical labeling and documentation

rules.subject: Equipment maintenance
rules.reasoning: OSHA requires documented equipment maintenance programs

rules.subject: Air quality in facility
rules.reasoning: Chemical exposure must be monitored and kept below OSHA limits
